title: Patch Up
description: Adds missing colorful blocks to the game!
body:
# About Patch Up
More cool colored furniture and blocks! Patch Up adds various furniture, blocks in colors of [Dye Depot](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-depot)

## ⚙️ Supported mods

* [Built!](https://modrinth.com/mod/built)

* [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/comforts)

* [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)

* [Hearth & Home](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-home) (Planned)

**Shoutout to starfish studios and ninni for creating amazing mods**

## 📝 Frequently Asked Questions

**Q:** Can I use this mod in my modpack? Can I make videos about it?

**A:** Yes! You are welcome to put Patch Up in your modpack or make videos about it. Make sure you give credit and don't claim it as your own.

---
**Q:** Will you backport to 1.16.5 or other previous versions?

**A:** Backports are not planned. The earliest version this mod will support is 1.20.1.

---
**Q:** Will be forge/neoforge/quilt version?

**A:** There is forge version, just not done by me. [Dye The World!](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-the-world)

---
**Q:** Will you be adding compatibility for other mods?

**A:** Possible, leave suggestion on our discord.

![AncientTeam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eca259ccb21523229f017be3ddcab76b26e2c49_0.webp)
